title: Our Dancing Daughters
writer: Josephine Lovett, Marian Ainslee, Ruth Cummings
actors: Joan Crawford, Johnny Mack Brown, Nils Asther
plot: A flapper who's secretly a good girl and a gold digging floozy masquerading as an ingénue both vie for the hand of a millionaire.
awards: Nominated for 2 Oscars. 2 wins & 2 nominations total
